languages.text: {n}Тервантьяс вонзает когти вам в плечо, опасно близко к артериям.{/n} "Забываешься, образец. Я изучал, деконструировал и модифицировал десятки подобных мон-кайских поделок — сервочерепа, так вы их зовете? Ни один из них не был так банален как этот".

{n}Tervantias pokes his claw into your shoulder, dangerously close to an artery.{/n} "You are forgetting your place, specimen. I have gutted, deconstructed, and reimagined dozens of these pathetic mon-keigh trinkets you call servo-skulls. Not a single one was as insultingly primitive as this one."
languages.original_text: {n}Тервантьяс вонзает когти вам в плечо, опасно близко к артериям.{/n} "Забываешься, образец. Я изучал, деконструировал и модифицировал десятки подобных мон-кайских поделок — сервочерепа, так вы их зовете? Ни один из них не был так банален как этот".

traits.locale_text: {n}Tervantias drives his claws into your shoulder, dangerously close to the arteries.{/n} "You're getting ahead of yourself, specimen. I have gutted, deconstructed, and reimagined dozens of these pathetic mon-keigh trinkets you call servo-skulls. Not a single one was as insultingly primitive as this one."

{n}Tervantias pokes his claw into your shoulder, dangerously close to an artery.{/n} "You are forgetting your place, specimen. I have gutted, deconstructed, and reimagined dozens of these pathetic mon-keigh trinkets you call servo-skulls. Not a single one was as insultingly primitive as this one."

languages.text: {n}Tervantias bohrt seine Klaue gefährliche nahe an einer Arterie in deine Schulter.{/n} "Ihr vergesst Eure Stellung, Versuchsstück." Ich habe schon Dutzende dieser Chem-Pan-Sey-Spielzeuge entleibt, dekonstruiert und neu zusammengesetzt, die ihr Servoschädel nennt. Nicht einer von ihnen war so primitiv wie dieser hier.
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias pokes his claw into your shoulder, dangerously close to an artery.{/n} "You are forgetting your place, specimen. I have gutted, deconstructed, and reimagined dozens of these pathetic mon-keigh trinkets you call servo-skulls. Not a single one was as insultingly primitive as this one."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tervantias bohrt seine Klaue gefährliche nahe an einer Arterie in deine Schulter.{/n} "Ihr vergesst Eure Stellung, Versuchsstück." Ich habe schon Dutzende dieser Chem-Pan-Sey-Spielzeuge entleibt, dekonstruiert und neu zusammengesetzt, die ihr Servoschädel nennt. Nicht einer von ihnen war so primitiv wie dieser hier.

languages.text: {n}Tervantias pose une griffe sur votre épaule, dangereusement près d'une artère.{/n} « Vous oubliez votre place, spécimen. J'ai déjà ouvert, déconstruit et réimaginé des dizaines d'appareils mon-keigh similaires, que vous désignez sous le nom de servocrânes. Je n'ai jamais vu de version aussi primitive que celle-ci. »
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias pokes his claw into your shoulder, dangerously close to an artery.{/n} "You are forgetting your place, specimen. I have gutted, deconstructed, and reimagined dozens of these pathetic mon-keigh trinkets you call servo-skulls. Not a single one was as insultingly primitive as this one."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tervantias pose une griffe sur votre épaule, dangereusement près d'une artère.{/n} « Vous oubliez votre place, spécimen. J'ai déjà ouvert, déconstruit et réimaginé des dizaines d'appareils mon-keigh similaires, que vous désignez sous le nom de servocrânes. Je n'ai jamais vu de version aussi primitive que celle-ci. »

languages.text: {n}Tervantias toca tu hombro con la garra, peligrosamente cerca de una arteria.{/n} «Olvidas tu posición, espécimen. He destripado, deconstruido y reimaginado montones de esos aparatos mon-keigh que llamas servocráneos. Ni uno de ellos era tan insultantemente primitivo como este».
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias pokes his claw into your shoulder, dangerously close to an artery.{/n} "You are forgetting your place, specimen. I have gutted, deconstructed, and reimagined dozens of these pathetic mon-keigh trinkets you call servo-skulls. Not a single one was as insultingly primitive as this one."

traits.locale_text: {n}Tervantias toca tu hombro con la garra, peligrosamente cerca de una arteria.{/n} «Olvidas tu posición, espécimen. He destripado, deconstruido y reimaginado montones de esos aparatos mon-keigh que llamas servocráneos. Ni uno de ellos era tan insultantemente primitivo como este».

languages.text: {n}Tervantias; pençesini omzuna, bir atardamarına tehlikeli derecede yakın bir yere götürüyor.{/n} "Haddini aşıyorsun numune. Hizmelet dediğiniz o acınası mon-keigh ıvır zıvırlarından onlarcasının içini deştim, parçaladım ve yeniden kurguladım. Bir tanesi bile bu kadar aşağılayıcı ilkellikte değildi."
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias pokes his claw into your shoulder, dangerously close to an artery.{/n} "You are forgetting your place, specimen. I have gutted, deconstructed, and reimagined dozens of these pathetic mon-keigh trinkets you call servo-skulls. Not a single one was as insultingly primitive as this one."

Hizmelet dediğiniz o acınası mon-keigh ıvır zıvırlarından onlarcasının içini deştim, parçaladım ve yeniden kurguladım. Bir tanesi bile bu kadar aşağılayıcı ilkellikte değildi."

languages.text: {n}特万提亚斯用利爪戳着你的肩膀，几乎要碰到动脉。{/n}“你太自以为是了，样本。你们叫作‘伺服头骨’的那种猴子破烂，我拆解、重构、改造过几十个，没有一个像这样粗劣得令人发指。”
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias pokes his claw into your shoulder, dangerously close to an artery.{/n} "You are forgetting your place, specimen. I have gutted, deconstructed, and reimagined dozens of these pathetic mon-keigh trinkets you call servo-skulls. Not a single one was as insultingly primitive as this one."

languages.text: {n}テルヴァントゥスが爪を肩に突き刺し、動脈の近くまで迫る。{/n}「君、自分の立場を忘れてるな。この哀れなモノケィの飾り物、サーボスカルを何十個も解体して再構築して想像したことがある。どれもこのほど侮辱的な原始的なものじゃなかった。」
languages.original_text: {n}Tervantias pokes his claw into your shoulder, dangerously close to an artery.{/n} "You are forgetting your place, specimen. I have gutted, deconstructed, and reimagined dozens of these pathetic mon-keigh trinkets you call servo-skulls. Not a single one was as insultingly primitive as this one."
